creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Running relatively recent kernel with INVARIANTS, for this run the last upstream commit was 'Eliminate the generated ldscript for arm and arm64' (1f61ba78fc3acd2). This sometimes happens under load (compiling Firefox).

panic: vm_page_astate_fcmpset: invalid head requeue request for page 0xfffffe0001616710
cpuid = 14
time = 1578174292
KDB: stack backtrace:
